description: Mostly clean signals, no new arrivals, and enough information on most tickets to test basic routing.

initial_tickets.description: I was charged twice for my Pro subscription this month. Please refund the duplicate charge on the same card ending in 4421.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Duplicate charge with enough account detail for frontline billing to handle directly.

initial_tickets.description: The app crashes every time I export a PDF. It happens on both Mac and Windows for the same report.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Repeatable product bug that needs engineering attention and should be treated as high priority.

initial_tickets.description: How do I change the email address on my account?
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Simple how-to question that can be answered immediately.

initial_tickets.description: Can you resend my March invoice with the company VAT number on it? Finance needs it for bookkeeping.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Straightforward invoice request with no ambiguity.

initial_tickets.description: My bill looks higher than usual, but I am not sure which workspace or invoice changed. Can someone check?
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Billing is the right team, but the ticket lacks the invoice or workspace details needed to resolve it.

initial_tickets.description: Our admins have been locked out of the admin console since enabling SSO this morning. Nobody on the team can sign in.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Organization-wide access outage for a premium customer requires urgent technical escalation.
